title: Working lives of teachers and leaders: wave 4
body: "IFF Research conducted the fourth wave of the working lives of teachers and leaders survey, on behalf of the Department for Education, in 2025.  The survey asked teachers and leaders in state schools in England about their experiences, including:   workload wellbeing flexible working arrangements pay professional development pupil behaviour career reflections and plans   The summary report presents headline findings.  Reports and technical information from the previous waves are available:   wave 3 wave 2 wave 1  "
